overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt of Rivia walking through a sunlit autumn forest. The character travels along a winding dirt path surrounded by trees with golden foliage, passing rock formations and wooden fences as the trail ascends through increasingly dense vegetation.

scene_state.functional_zone: sunlit forest trail with mist and rock formations

events.description: large rock outcrop comes into view on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the forest trail, approaching large rock formations on the left

entered.detail: winding dirt trail through the forest with patches of sunlight
tall deciduous and coniferous trees with autumn-colored foliage
low-lying mist visible in the distance between trees
large gray boulder formation alongside the path
tall golden and green grass lining both sides of the trail

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with Geralt walking along a wide, sunlit forest trail surrounded by autumn trees. Atmospheric mist hangs in the distance as the character approaches and passes large rock formations on the left side of the path. The environment is open and exposed with clear skies visible overhead.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail with wooden fencing and small bridge crossing

events.description: wooden split-rail fence appears along the left side of the path
character crosses a small wooden plank bridge over a stream

agents.ego_description: walking past the wooden fence and crossing a small wooden bridge, continuing along the winding trail

entered.detail: rustic wooden fence running parallel to the left side of the path
narrow wooden plank bridge crossing a small stream or dry creek bed
thick bushes and undergrowth filling the spaces between trees

segments.scene_description: The trail continues past a wooden split-rail fence on the left, leading to a small wooden bridge crossing. The vegetation becomes denser with thick shrubs lining the path, and the tree canopy begins to provide more cover, creating dappled lighting on the ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow ascending forest path through dense hillside vegetation

events.description: trail begins ascending more steeply uphill through denser forest

agents.ego_description: walking uphill along the narrowing forest trail, surrounded by dense vegetation on both sides

entered.detail: steep forested hillside rising on the left side of the path
thick low vegetation and ferns crowding the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the path narrowing and ascending through increasingly dense forest. The wooden fence and bridge are left behind as the trail climbs uphill, flanked by steep hillsides and thick underbrush. The tree canopy closes overhead, creating a more enclosed and shaded environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit autumn forest that gradually transforms from an open, airy trail into a dense, enclosed woodland. It begins with Geralt walking along a wide path flanked by large rock formations under a clear sky, with atmospheric mist lingering in the distance. As the character progresses, the trail leads past a wooden split-rail fence and across a small bridge, while the surrounding vegetation thickens and the canopy begins to cast dappled light across the ground. The scene then shifts as the path narrows and ascends uphill, leaving the open structures behind. Finally, the environment becomes increasingly shaded and enclosed as the trail climbs through steep hillsides and thick underbrush beneath a closing canopy of golden trees.
